isModuleType(uint256).details: Returns boolean value if module is a certain type

params.moduleTypeId: the module type ID according the ERC-7579 spec MUST return true if the module is of the given type and false otherwise

params.userOpHash: the hash of the ERC-4337 PackedUserOperation MUST validate that the signature is a valid signature of the userOpHash SHOULD return ERC-4337's SIG_VALIDATION_FAILED (and not revert) on signature mismatch See {IAccount-validateUserOp} for additional information on the return value
